name: chr16_OR_cluster
description: Zebrafish olfactory receptor cluster: tertiary OR cluster on chr16 (OR113/OR114 subfamilies). Zebrafish OR repertoire (~150 functional genes) is smaller than mammalian (~400-1300) but spans the same 7TM rhodopsin-like fold. Intra-cluster identity 60-95%, with recent tandem duplicates above 98%. Niimura & Nei 2005 phylogeny identifies 9 OR subfamilies in teleosts.
